title: pteris khasiana subsp. fauriei
intro: Pteris khasiana subsp. fauriei, also known as Khasi brake fern, is a subspecies of fern belonging to the Pteris genus, characterized by its creeping rhizomes and slender fronds. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pteris khasiana subsp. fauriei include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
